title: ちゃいけない・じゃいけない

quiz_sentences.indonesian: Kamu tidak boleh melihat HP sebelum tidur.
quiz_sentences.english: You shouldn't look at your smartphone before going to bed.
quiz_sentences.japanese: 寝る前にスマホを⾒ちゃダメよ。
quiz_sentences.romaji: neru mae ni sumaho o micha dame yo.

quiz_sentences.indonesian: Area ini berbahaya, jadi kamu tidak boleh masuk.
quiz_sentences.english: This area is dangerous, so you're not allowed to enter.
quiz_sentences.japanese: ここはきけんなので、⼊っちゃダメだよ。
quiz_sentences.romaji: koko wa kiken nano de, haiccha dame da yo.

quiz_sentences.indonesian: Aku melakukan hal yang tidak boleh dilakukan...
quiz_sentences.english: I did something I shouldn't have...
quiz_sentences.japanese: やっちゃいけないことをやっちゃった。

quiz_sentences.indonesian: Kamu tidak boleh kehilangan kepercayaan diri!
quiz_sentences.japanese: ⾃信をなくしちゃいけません！

quiz_sentences.indonesian: Kamu tidak boleh terlalu sering bolos kelas.
quiz_sentences.english: You shouldn't skip class so much.
quiz_sentences.japanese: そんなに授業をさぼっちゃダメよ。
quiz_sentences.romaji: sonna ni jugyou o saboccha dame yo.

quiz_sentences.japanese: 彼を信⽤しちゃいけない。

quiz_sentences.indonesian: Kamu tidak boleh mengabaikan lampu merah!
quiz_sentences.english: You must not ignore red lights!
quiz_sentences.japanese: 赤信号をむししちゃいけません！
quiz_sentences.romaji: aka shingou o mushi shicha ikemasen!

quiz_sentences.indonesian: Tidak boleh makan hidangan penutup sebelum selesai makan sayur.
quiz_sentences.english: No eating dessert until you finish eating your vegetables.
quiz_sentences.japanese: 野菜を⾷べるまでデザートを⾷べちゃいけないよ。
quiz_sentences.romaji: yasai o taberu made dezaato o tabecha ikenai yo.

quiz_sentences.indonesian: Kita tidak boleh mengucapkan kata-kata buruk di depan anak-anak.
quiz_sentences.english: We must not say bad words in front of children.
quiz_sentences.japanese: ⼦どもの前に悪いことばを⾔っちゃいけません。
quiz_sentences.romaji: kodomo no mae ni warui kotoba o iccha ikemasen.

quiz_sentences.indonesian: Orang yang berusia di bawah 20 tahun tidak boleh minum alkohol.
quiz_sentences.english: People under the age of 20 cannot drink alcohol.
quiz_sentences.japanese: ２０歳未満の⼈はお酒を飲んじゃいけません。
quiz_sentences.romaji: hatachi miman no hito wa osake o nonja ikemasen.
